title: Technology markets plunge due to OpenAI's IPO delay and AI fears
summary: The Nasdaq leads the losses on Wall Street after the announcement that OpenAI postpones its IPO until 2027, extending the sector's declines for five consecutive trading days.

title: Oil retreats to pre-conflict levels due to oversupply
summary: Crude falls to $70 per barrel as ships return to the Strait of Hormuz and global production remains abundant.

title: Asian stock markets plunge dragged down by the technology sector
summary: The Nikkei records its third biggest historical drop as investors take profits and fear contagion from Wall Street.

title: SpaceX: analysts recommend holding the stock ahead of its IPO and AI business
summary: Several analysts initiate coverage of SpaceX with a hold recommendation, highlighting the record of its IPO and its artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: Apple raises prices on Macs and iPads by 20%
summary: The company increases the price of its laptops and tablets, although the market awaits the impact on the iPhone.

title: Volkswagen to cut 100,000 jobs by 2030
summary: The German automaker accelerates its restructuring and adjusts its workforce to face the electric transition.

title: Binance leaves the European Union after failing to obtain a license
summary: The cryptocurrency exchange ceases its services in the EU and seeks the MiCA license in another country of the bloc.

title: Polymarket reaches $1 billion in revenue after its US launch
summary: The decentralized predictions platform achieves this milestone in just six weeks since its debut in the US market.

title: Interactive Brokers positions itself to benefit from high interest rates
summary: The online broker attracts investors looking for returns in a high-rate environment.

title: Micron surprises with record results and shakes up the semiconductor market
summary: Micron shares rise after publishing exceptional quarterly results that cause a restructuring in the sector.

title: Bitcoin plummets to its lowest level since October 2024
summary: The cryptocurrency falls 27% in five days dragged by regulatory uncertainty and risk aversion, affecting companies like Strategy.

title: Ibex 35 loses 19,400 points dragged down by oil and renewables
summary: The Spanish benchmark falls 0.67% in a session of widespread losses in European stock markets.

title: Chinese AI model threatens Anthropic before its IPO
summary: The emergence of a new Chinese language model poses a competitive challenge for Anthropic in the final stretch of its IPO.

title: Bumble jumps 15% as it explores a potential sale
summary: The dating app evaluates a sale, which boosts its shares in the market.

title: Unilever explores a bid for supplement maker Thorne
summary: The consumer goods multinational studies acquiring Thorne, valued at $4 billion, to expand in health.

title: SpaceX plans to launch Starlink mobile services for consumers in the US
summary: Elon Musk's company seeks to offer direct mobile connectivity through its satellite network.

title: Revolut eliminates remote work for its new graduates
summary: The neobank changes its labor policy and will require in-person attendance for new hires.

title: JIC CEO says the sale of JSR is not decided
summary: The new CEO of the Japanese fund clarifies that he has not made a decision on the divestment in JSR.

title: Iraq pressures OPEC to increase its oil production
summary: Baghdad requests the organization an increase in its pumping quota to take advantage of current prices.

title: Rocket Lab shares rebound without a clear catalyst
summary: The aerospace company experiences a rise in the stock market without a specific news being identified to motivate it.
